prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The Planning Inspectorate primarily operates in England and Wales, and the report pertains to experimental statistics relevant to ministerial measures within that context. It does not apply to Scotland as the planning system and statistical reporting might differ significantly under devolved powers.
